name: gtm-grader
description: Scores SaaS websites against 77 research-backed checks across 13 categories: 47 optimization rules from peer-reviewed marketing science (brand messaging, page design, pricing, trials, freemium, churn, affiliates, referrals), 9 positioning checks from Dunford and Fletch PMM frameworks, and 21 search discoverability checks (technical SEO, E-E-A-T signals, content depth) with competitive landscape analysis and scored content pillar recommendations. Commands: grade, position, search, wins, export.
